blended.narrative: Stoneham is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 11 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
